sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Remember your compassion, O Lord, and your merciful love, for they are from of old. Let not our enemies exult over us. Redeem us, O God of Israel, from all our distress.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: The Lord is my light and my salvation.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: From the shinning cloud the Father's voice is heard: This is my beloved Son, hear him.

sections.title: Purify My Heart
sections.author: Brian Doerksen
sections.snippet: Purify my heart, let me be as gold and precious silver. Purify my heart, let me be as gold, pure gold.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased; listen to him.

sections.title: Be Still and Know That I Am God
sections.author: Christopher Walker / Sr. Paule Freeburg DC
sections.snippet: Be still and know that I am God. You are my chosen one, to whom my love I give. My life is yours, in you I live. Be still, be still and know that I am God.

sections.title: Meditation
sections.author: Grayson Warren Brown
sections.snippet: Jesus, Jesus, precious Savior, heal us, hold us, help us find rest.

sections.title: May the Road Rise Up
sections.author: Tom Kendzia
sections.snippet: May the road rise up to meet you, may the wind be always at your back. May the sun shine warm upon your face, the rain fall soft upon your ﬁelds. And until we meet again, until we meet again, may God hold you in the palm of his hand. Until we meet again, until we meet again, may God hold you, may God hold you,may God hold you in the palm of his hand.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
